subject: docs: adopt AI mistake log and cross-reference from glow-props CLAUDE.md
body:
Reviewed sibling project glow-props CLAUDE.md for patterns applicable to
model-pear. Adopted the AI_MISTAKES.md concept for tracking AI errors across
sessions, added cross-reference comment for periodic review, and expanded
AI Notes with learnings from glow-props.

Changes:
- Created docs/AI_MISTAKES.md (empty template for logging AI mistakes)
- Added cross-reference to glow-props CLAUDE.md in AI Notes (HTML comment)
- Added AI notes: "ask before assuming bug causes", "check AI_MISTAKES.md"
- Updated documentation reference table and file tree

Tags: docs, claude-md, cross-project, ai-session
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: ai-session-management
Semver: patch
